dialogueLines.Speaker: Stevey
dialogueLines.text: Hey kid! Echo, right? I see you here often with your friend Irene. She's a sweetheart, eh? Anyways, I appreciate you guys keepin' the place clean and honorin' your friend, so I thought I'd give you this.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Stevey
dialogueLines.text: That there's a lockpick, a remnant from my trouble makin' days. Seein' as you're just about in those days yourself, I want you to have it.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Stevey
dialogueLines.text: To top it off, I've got just the thing you can practice on. Can you open up my trunk here? I forgot the key in my truck.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Stevey
dialogueLines.text: Don't wanna go all the way back just for a key, but I can't fish without my rod!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Stevey
dialogueLines.text: Don't wanna go all the way back just for a key, but I can't fish without my rod!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Stevey
dialogueLines.text: Plus, if you're good enough to open my trunk, you'll probably be able to get into that locked box in the shed! I don't even remember what's in there!
